provider: HKUST 2025/26 BSc in Environmental Management and Technology Major Requirements
note: The official PDF is headed 2026-27 requirements for the 2025-26 intake. This supplement records 56 explicit coded courses across the Fundamental, Required and named Environmental Management and Technology Elective lists. The additional rule allowing all ENVR elective courses is an open subject-level pool and is not expanded into a fabricated closed list. COMP1022P and SOSC4290 remain because the intake-specific PDF explicitly lists them, while noting that they were last offered in 2024-25 and 2023-24 respectively and deleted subsequently. University Common Core requirements are outside this Programme-local supplement, so these rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision.
